reason: AI, game IP, webtoon, or K-pop names matter only when ARR, bookings, ad/IP revenue, cloud revenue, or live-service revenue appears.
ERP renewal, SaaS churn, live-service bookings, fan platform ARPU, and paid content retention separate Stage 2 from Stage 3.
AI and content revenue must convert to OPM, FCF, or gross-margin durability.
AI/cloud/platform/IP bottleneck gets credit, but not enough to create Green alone.
Stage 2 이후 60D MFE helps identify early Stage 3, while Stage 2 이후 120D MFE helps 4B cooling.
Privacy, security, founder legal risk, governance, release delay, lawsuit, and guidance misses can cap or break the thesis.
AI SW, game IP, webtoon, K-pop, and platform narratives often reprice before repeat revenue confirms.
